title: CITY OF MEDFORD PARKS AND RECREATION - 211info
text: SANTO COMMUNITY CENTER CITY OF MEDFORD PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides athletic (youth and adult sports), preschool, and community-based recreation opportunities in community centers and swimming pool. Operates and maintains city parks, natural areas, hiking trails, and community centers. 701 N Columbus Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: -Unrestricted; acitivites are for all ages. Offers special programs for ages 3-13. -Preschool: Ages 3-5 Hours: Varies by activity Email (541) 774-2400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-2400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information or to view the event calendar FEES: Varies by service; income-based scholarships are available DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for scholarship LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Medford SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
